positive: A highly detailed, stylized depiction of interconnected celestial flora. The composition is centered, featuring sweeping arcs of bioluminescent vines, stylized crescent moons, and geometric planetary rings intertwining with delicate, exotic flowers (like lotuses and celestial orchids). Use a palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, warm gold, and hints of deep magenta. The style should be a blend of art deco symmetry and modern sacred geometry, utilizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. The overall aesthetic must be symmetrical, highly graphic, and optimized for single-color screen printing or textile sublimation, making the design impactful regardless of background. Central composition, vector art style, intricate linework, cosmic tapestry, kawaii goth, high contrast, minimal shading.
